---
title: "Examples: Load MATHia"
author: "Philip I. Pavlik Jr."
date: "2026-06-07"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Examples: Load MATHia}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
---

```{r setup}
source("lkt-vignette-setup.R")
```

# Load MATHia

```{r load-mathia}
val2 <- prepare_mathia_sample()

check_true("MATHia row count", nrow(val2) == 49521)
check_true("MATHia folds", setequal(as.integer(unique(val2$fold)), 1:5))
check_true("MATHia spacing columns", all(c(
  "KC..MATHia.spacing",
  "Problem.Namespacing",
  "Anon.Student.Idspacing"
) %in% names(val2)))
```
